title: anagallis arvensis f. pallida
intro: Anagallis arvensis f. pallida is a pale-flowered form of the Pimpernel plant, a low-growing, annual or biennial herb belonging to the Primulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anagallis arvensis f. pallida include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Anagallis arvensis f. pallida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
